overview: A Smart Career Recommendation Web Application with a ChatGPT-style conversational interface. Users answer guided questions about interests, skills, and personality, then receive personalized career recommendations with specific explanations linking their exact answers to each match score.
features: ChatGPT-like chat UI with left sidebar, typing animations, and dark mode
Conversational question flow for interests, skills (1-5 rating), and personality
Scoring engine: Interests 30%, Skills 40%, Personality 30% across 7 careers
Specific personalized explanations citing user's actual answers
Edit Answers or Start New Chat after results
Chat history sidebar with title + preview snippets
Sessions persisted in backend canister state
